channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-15 06:26 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: this is an early beta. we still have much to improve, which is why its so exciting for people to sta...
item.description: this is an early beta. we still have much to improve, which is why its so exciting for people to start trying. the goal is for Grok Build to be the best coding agent when it comes to solving real and difficult engineering problems.

item.title: @elonmusk: Early beta and we are looking forward to your feedback! We will keep improving until Grok Build is a...
item.description: Early beta and we are looking forward to your feedback! We will keep improving until Grok Build is absolutely the best in the world

item.title: @elonmusk: xAI just released Grok Build CLI and it’s a game changer for developers Grok Build is a powerful AI ...
item.description: xAI just released Grok Build CLI and it’s a game changer for developers Grok Build is a powerful AI coding agent and CLI built for professional software engineering and complex coding workflows running directly in your terminal With Grok Build CLI, you can: - Plan and review tasks before execution with clean diffs - Run multiple sub-agents in parallel for large projects - Use headless mode for automation and scripting - Seamlessly work with your existing tools and setups This is xAI going all-in on giving power users real engineering tools Currently in early beta and exclusively available for SuperGrok Heavy subscribers If you’re on SuperGrok Heavy, you can start using it right now Check it out here:x.ai/news/grok-build-cli

item.title: @elonmusk: It’s crazy to design things for a social app, AI, and space all before lunch
item.description: It’s crazy to design things for a social app, AI, and space all before lunch

item.title: @elonmusk: Been using this internally for months. Recommended
item.description: Been using this internally for months. Recommended

item.title: @elonmusk: Natively-agentic is just one of the perks. The overall experience is a step change from anything out...
item.description: Natively-agentic is just one of the perks. The overall experience is a step change from anything out there. And then you add the focus to details, user experience, and how supreme the team behind this - you will be more than impressed.

item.title: @elonmusk: Just subscribed to Grok SuperHeavy so I could try out their new command line interface. They have a ...
item.description: Just subscribed to Grok SuperHeavy so I could try out their new command line interface. They have a special deal going where it's only $99 a month for the next 6 months, instead of the usual $299

item.title: @elonmusk: Install. Try. Share Feedback. Ship stuff.
item.description: Install. Try. Share Feedback. Ship stuff.

item.title: @elonmusk: Episode 172 Part 1 is live! Fresh off the plane from Dubai, Zuby (@ZubyMusic) has his first supervis...
item.description: Episode 172 Part 1 is live! Fresh off the plane from Dubai, Zuby (@ZubyMusic) has his first supervised FSD ride in Austin. He discusses his global experiences and the biggest myth about masculinity. Drop a listen ❤️ (Pt 2 soon!)

item.title: @elonmusk: all of their ideas now are like “should we dissolve the government, imprison our opponents, and seiz...
item.description: all of their ideas now are like “should we dissolve the government, imprison our opponents, and seize every lever of power in the country? we’re the good guys remember, if we don’t do this the bad guys will win (an election)” like they don’t even talk about healthcare anymore lol

item.title: @elonmusk: Please list the most important features to improve, fix or add in the replies below:
item.description: Please list the most important features to improve, fix or add in the replies below:

item.title: @elonmusk: Holy shit I’m going to need another Grok Heavy account. Grok Build is god-tier 👌
item.description: Holy shit I’m going to need another Grok Heavy account. Grok Build is god-tier 👌

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk and Jensen Huang hanging out on Air Force One (with Diet Coke lol). To be a fly on that wa...
item.description: Elon Musk and Jensen Huang hanging out on Air Force One (with Diet Coke lol). To be a fly on that wall...

item.title: @elonmusk: Go in with expectations that Grok Build is still beta, but improving almost every day
item.description: Go in with expectations that Grok Build is still beta, but improving almost every day

item.title: @elonmusk: Try this early Grok Build (anything) beta and let us know what to improve. Much appreciated!
item.description: Try this early Grok Build (anything) beta and let us know what to improve. Much appreciated!
